articles.title: Kristi Noem ‘devastated’ by story about her husband’s online activities
articles.summary: A former CIA officer warns Kristi Noem may have been a blackmail risk after the Daily Mail reported on her husband Bryon's alleged secret fetish life.

articles.title: Trump admin unlawfully terminated legal status of migrants who used Biden-era app, judge rules
articles.summary: A federal judge ruled the Trump administration unlawfully ended parole status for migrants who used the CBP One app, and ordered DHS to reverse the move.

articles.title: Alabama Gov Kay Ivey hospitalized following minor procedure, says she is determined to make speedy recovery
articles.summary: Alabama Gov. Kay Ivey, 81, was hospitalized after undergoing a minor procedure to remove fluid that was pressing on her lung, her office said on Tuesday.

articles.title: Marco Rubio warns Iran wanted to be the 'next North Korea' as he sees 'finish line' in conflict
articles.summary: Marco Rubio says the U.S. can 'see the finish line' in the Iran conflict, warning Tehran was pursuing intercontinental missiles and aimed to become the next North Korea.

articles.title: Florida Supreme Court keeps ex-cop's execution on hold after DNA test fails to give a clear answer
articles.summary: Florida's Supreme Court denied a request to lift James Duckett's execution stay after DNA testing of key evidence came back inconclusive Friday.

articles.title: Raiders coach Klint Kubiak favors veteran QB, hesitant to start rookie early in season
articles.summary: Fernando Mendoza could land in Las Vegas after the 2026 NFL Draft, but the incoming rookie quarterback may not start in Week 1, coach Klint Kubiak hinted.

articles.title: Browns' Todd Monken explains reason behind missing NFL head coach group photo
articles.summary: The Cleveland Browns' Todd Monken missed the NFL head coaches group photo in Phoenix this week due to a haircut mix-up, which he thought he had timed perfectly.

articles.title: Rogan warns of US ‘population collapse’ due to toxic chemicals and delayed parenthood tank birth rates
articles.summary: Joe Rogan warns of a U.S. population collapse, citing endocrine-disrupting chemicals in plastics and food as a key driver of declining fertility, alongside delayed parenthood.

articles.title: Wisconsin mother stabs teen daughter to death to 'protect' her from Elon Musk: authorities
articles.summary: A Wisconsin mother allegedly stabbed her 14-year-old daughter to death, telling police she did it to protect the girl from tech executive Elon Musk.

articles.title: Contributor for far-left outlet calls for 'wiping out Israel,' says Israelis 'mustn't feel safe'
articles.summary: A contributor for the far-left outlet Drop Site News called for "wiping out Israel" and called Israelis "terrorist parasites" who "must be removed from our planet" in an Instagram post.

articles.title: Trump signs executive order overhauling mail-in voting in major election integrity push

articles.summary: Amy Hillyard, 52, has been missing from Oakland since March 25. Authorities classified her as at-risk, and hundreds of volunteers are searching the East Bay.

articles.summary: A giant 10-pound chocolate Easter bunny from Costco, priced up to $140, has sparked debate on social media over its price, quality and smash-to-eat instructions.

articles.summary: A NYC rideshare driver was reportedly carjacked at gunpoint by four masked men in Lower Manhattan, and the stolen SUV was later recovered in Newark, N.J.

articles.title: Joseph Duggar demands jury trial after pleading not guilty to child molestation charges
articles.summary: Joseph Duggar of TLC's "19 Kids and Counting" pleaded not guilty to child molestation charges and was held on $600,000 bond in Florida court. He was arrested March 18.

articles.title: Luke Bryan credits religious roots and small-town values for helping him navigate a 'challenging life'
articles.summary: Country star Luke Bryan credits his Baptist church upbringing and small-town values for helping him navigate the many challenges of fame and stardom.

articles.title: Tiger Woods stepping away from golf to 'seek treatment' following DUI arrest
